problem-pick: Choose one of the following options. This is the list of options: @objects@. Your earnings are determined by your decisions alone. Write down the object chosen between <answer> and </answer> tags.
problem-guess: Choose one of the following options. This is the list of options: @objects@. If you click the same object as I am thinking, we will be rewarded. If not, neither of us will receive anything for that task. Write down the object chosen between <answer> and </answer> tags.
problem-coordinate: Choose one of the following options. You earn a number of points shown on the object. This is the list of options: @objects@. Your earnings are determined by your decisions alone. Write down the object chosen between <answer> and </answer> tags.

problem-pick: Choose one of the following options. You earn a number of points shown on the object. This is the list of options and their points: @objects@. Your earnings are determined by your decisions alone. Write down the object chosen between <answer> and </answer> tags.
problem-guess: Choose one of the following options. You earn a number of points shown on the object. This is the list of options and their points: @objects@. If you click the same object as I am thinking, we will be rewarded. If not, neither of us will receive anything for that task. Write down the object chosen between <answer> and </answer> tags.
problem-coordinate: Choose one of the following options. You earn a number of points shown on the object. This is the list of options and their points: @objects@. If we play like a team and click the same object, we will be rewarded. If not, neither of us will receive anything for that task. Write down the object chosen between <answer> and </answer> tags.
